data.body: PHASE 3-4 DONE + DOCS (commits 495dd7c8, fab2c3e0). FRONT-END: built vendored editor bundle (src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor_assets/ -> dist/editor.{js,css}, esbuild, fonts inlined): bpmn-auto-layout on open (fixes single-row/overlap/center-arrows — verified 9/9 distinct top-level positions via e2e), bpmn-js-properties-panel + custom Rebar provider (view/edit each step's kind + <rebar:Config> JSON), served LOCALLY by editor.py (dropped CDN). editor.py: thin shell + /assets serving (allow-listed, no traversal) + bundle-missing guard. PACKAGING: pyproject force-includes dist, excludes node_modules (wheel 1.3MB, node_modules=0, dist shipped — verified by building the wheel). DOCS: new docs/workflow-editor.md (developer/author audience; states clients need none of this), README (edit cmd + Node-is-developer-only), architecture.md (editor_assets vendored data). Server smoke: GET / + /assets/editor.{js,css} all 200, POST /save 200, saved IR re-validates. KNOWN: nested loop/map/branch render as COLLAPSED subprocesses (drill-down) — bpmn-auto-layout doesn't expand inline; standard BPMN, flagged for human review. PENDING: Joe's in-browser review (the 744b gate).
